About Tender

Tender was founded in 2026 with one goal: to help businesses succeed through reliable and affordable services.

We are a team of experienced professionals who are passionate about delivering quality work. Our clients trust us because we listen, we deliver, and we care about their success.

Over the years, we have worked with businesses of all sizes - from startups to established companies. We believe in building long-term relationships based on trust and results.

Our Mission

To provide business solutions that help our clients grow and achieve their goals.

Our Vision

To become the most trusted business partner in the region.

Company Snapshot

Founded: 2026

Location: Nairobi, Kenya

Team: 15+ professionals

Clients: 100+ businesses
